en: Thanks, man.
And just to get some visibility, if that's okay,
ko: 그리고 좀 보이게 해줄 수 있을까, 괜찮다면?

en: because I just heard that more tweaks
ko: 내 분야에서 더 많은 수정이 있었다고 들었어.

en: have been made in my arena. It's cool.
Okay, well, if I could just take a quick peek. Carl, man, it's not a good time.
ko: 좋아, 그럼 잠깐만 좀 볼 수 있을까? 칼, 지금은 때가 아니야.

en: Oh, but then if you could just talk me through it,
ko: 아, 그럼 그냥 설명만 좀 해줄 수 있으면,

en: just, no, just so I'm comfortable in my own mind that I got your back. It is all good, Carl, okay?
ko: 아니, 그냥 내가 네 편이라는 걸 확신하고 싶어서 그래. 다 괜찮아, 칼. 알겠지?

en: Well, we really need, just a second, hang on, just.
It's not a good time, Carl.
Oh, really? Well, listen to me.
ko: 아, 정말? 그럼 내 말 좀 들어.

en: I took a lot of shit from your dad
because we've been through the mill,
but I've been a CFO at major public companies
ko: 하지만 난 주요 상장 회사에서 CFO를 맡아 왔어.

en: for over two decades,
and I know a thing or two about a thing or two.
And if you fuck up his deal,
ko: 내가 불안한 숫자를 제시하려고 한다면, 맹세할게.

en: or you try to stand up numbers
that I am not comfortable with, I swear to God.
ko: 뭐, 일주일 만에 네 최고 재무 책임자를 해고할 거야?

en: Hey, easy, easy.
CEO, CFO.
What, you're gonna fire your chief financial officer
a week in?
Your dad just gone?
You'd be fucking toast.
You have my dick in your hand, Ken, but I've got yours in mine.
ko: 너는 내 걸 쥐고 있지만, 나는 네 걸 쥐고 있어.
